data_quality: v0.1 best-effort population from cited public sources. Each entity's compat claims trace to source_ids on its attributes. Verification pass required before production launch; this dataset is sized to prove the engine end-to-end, not for general consumer trust.

sources.name: AMD product pages (public spec sheets)
sources.scope: CPU specs: base/boost clocks, TDP, socket, memory support, iGPU. GPU specs: VRAM, TDP, recommended PSU, dimensions.

sources.name: Intel ARK / product pages (public spec sheets)
sources.scope: CPU specs: base/boost clocks, TDP, socket, memory support, iGPU presence.

sources.name: NVIDIA product pages (public spec sheets)
sources.scope: GPU specs: VRAM, VRAM type, TDP, recommended PSU wattage, card length, power connector requirements, PCIe generation.

sources.name: Motherboard manufacturer product pages — ASUS, MSI, Gigabyte, ASRock
sources.scope: Motherboard specs: chipset, socket, form factor, memory slots, max memory speed, M.2 slot count, WiFi generation.

sources.name: Memory/PSU/storage manufacturer pages — Corsair, Kingston, Samsung, G.Skill, Crucial, Seasonic, be quiet!, MSI PSU
sources.scope: RAM specs: capacity, speed, CAS latency, voltage. PSU specs: wattage, efficiency, modularity, ATX revision, connector count. Storage specs: capacity, interface, sequential read speed.

sources.name: PCPartPicker public component database
sources.scope: Cross-reference for form factor compatibility, dimensions, compatibility flags. Public specs only — no scraping of pricing engine.

sources.name: r/buildapc wiki + Tom's Hardware spec articles (public)
sources.scope: Community-validated compatibility notes, recommended PSU headroom conventions, cooler TDP rating methodology.

sources.name: Hardware Unboxed + Gamers Nexus benchmark data summaries (public YouTube descriptions and written articles)
sources.scope: Real-world TDP / power draw cross-check, cooler performance tier rankings, GPU real-world length measurements.

entities.name: ASUS ROG Strix X870E-E Gaming WiFi
G.Skill Trident Z5 RGB 32GB DDR5-6000 CL30
Corsair Dominator Platinum RGB 96GB DDR5-6400 CL32
ASUS ROG Strix B760-A Gaming WiFi
G.Skill Trident Z5 Neo 32GB DDR5-6000 CL30 (AMD EXPO)
ASUS ROG Strix B850-F Gaming WiFi
G.Skill Trident Z5 Royal Neo 32GB DDR5-6400 CL32
Arctic Liquid Freezer III Pro 360 A-RGB

constraints.description: CPU socket must match motherboard socket exactly.
constraints.error_message: CPU socket {cpu.socket} is incompatible with motherboard socket {motherboard.socket}.

constraints.description: RAM speed (MT/s) must not exceed CPU's maximum supported memory speed.
constraints.error_message: RAM speed {ram.speed_mt_s} MT/s exceeds CPU max of {cpu.max_memory_mt_s} MT/s; XMP profile will be capped or may not post.

constraints.description: RAM speed (MT/s) must not exceed motherboard's maximum supported memory speed.
constraints.error_message: RAM speed {ram.speed_mt_s} MT/s exceeds motherboard max of {motherboard.max_memory_speed_mt_s} MT/s.

constraints.description: Motherboard form factor must be in the list of form factors supported by the case.
constraints.error_message: Motherboard form factor {motherboard.form_factor} is not supported by case {case.name} (supports: {case.form_factors_supported}).

constraints.description: GPU length must not exceed case's maximum GPU clearance.
constraints.error_message: GPU length {gpu.length_mm}mm exceeds case max GPU clearance of {case.max_gpu_length_mm}mm.

constraints.description: Air cooler height must not exceed case's maximum CPU cooler height clearance. Constraint skipped for AIO coolers.
constraints.error_message: Air cooler height {cooler.height_mm}mm exceeds case max CPU cooler height of {case.max_cpu_cooler_height_mm}mm.

constraints.description: CPU cooler must explicitly list the CPU's socket in its supported sockets.
constraints.error_message: Cooler {cooler.name} does not list support for socket {cpu.socket}.

constraints.description: PSU wattage must be >= GPU recommended PSU wattage and >= cpu_tdp + gpu_tdp + 100W headroom.
constraints.error_message: PSU {psu.wattage_w}W is insufficient. GPU recommends {gpu.recommended_psu_w}W; system draw estimate is {cpu.tdp_w + gpu.tdp_w + 100}W.

constraints.description: If GPU requires a 12V-2x6 (16-pin) connector, PSU must have at least one native 12V-2x6 connector.
constraints.error_message: GPU requires a 12V-2x6 (16-pin) connector but PSU {psu.name} has none natively. An adapter can be used but is not recommended for high-TDP cards.

constraints.description: Motherboard must have at least as many M.2 slots as the number of M.2 NVMe drives selected.
constraints.error_message: Motherboard has only {motherboard.m2_slots} M.2 slot(s) but {storage_count} M.2 NVMe drive(s) selected.
